Story.title: The Art of Tailoring
Story.subtitle: Born in Amman. Worn at the moments that matter.
Story.p1: Deep in the heart of Amman, where historical depth meets contemporary architecture, we shape the silhouettes of Jordan's most distinguished men. VOGO is not just clothing; it is a statement of stature, dignity, and Jordanian luxury.
Story.p2: Every suit passing through our atelier is handcrafted by master tailors using exclusive Italian and British wools. We believe that true tailoring is not seen — it is felt. It is in the perfect roll of a lapel, the clean drape of a trouser, and the effortless movement of fabric.
Story.p3: From real silk threads to natural horn buttons, every component is curated with precision to harmonize with your stance, empowering you at the defining moments of your life.

Wedding.title: The Groom's Room
Wedding.subtitle: Your Wedding. Your Suit. Your Defining Moment.
Wedding.description: Because your wedding is the ultimate personal milestone, we offer our bespoke tuxedo and wedding suit consultation. A premium, private tailoring experience ensuring you look and feel extraordinary on your wedding day.

Testimonials.title: Voices of Distinction
Testimonials.subtitle: What the men who choose VOGO say

reviews.name: Tareq Haddad
reviews.quote: The wedding tuxedo was absolutely perfect. The precision in fit and weight of the Italian wool is unlike anything else in Jordan.

reviews.name: Faisal Al-Jabor
reviews.quote: Wearing VOGO's double-breasted gray suit to my board meeting immediately shifted the room's energy. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Omar Al-Shaboul
reviews.quote: The velvet burgundy jacket was a masterpiece. It turned heads all evening, and the fit was comfortable enough to wear for hours.

reviews.name: Yazan Aqrabawi
reviews.quote: The ivory linen blazer was my summer savior. Lightweight, breathable, and yet kept a structured, upscale profile.

reviews.name: Khalid Masri
reviews.quote: From the first fitting to the final stitch, the team treated my wedding suit like a work of art. Worth every dinar.

Cart.pageDesc: Review your pieces, adjust sizes and quantities, then proceed to secure checkout.

Checkout.successWhatsapp: Your order details were sent to WhatsApp. Our team will confirm shortly.

Products.title: Products

Products.imageHint: Place files in public/images/products/, then choose or paste the path.
Products.confirmRemoveBody: The product will be hidden from the shop. Existing orders are preserved.

Avatars.errorDuplicate: Slug already exists. Use a unique value.
Avatars.errorUpload: Image upload failed. Try again or paste a path.

Collections.title: Categories

Collections.errorDuplicate: This URL slug is already in use.
Collections.errorHasProducts: Remove or reassign products before deleting this category.
Collections.confirmDeleteBody: This cannot be undone. Only empty categories can be deleted.

Promotions.title: Promotions
Promotions.subtitle: Campaign studio — promo codes and timed sales for products or collections.
Promotions.studioHint: Use timed sales to show badges and lower prices automatically. Use promo codes for checkout discounts on orders, collections, or selected pieces.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.tryOnSubtitle: Choose whether try-on runs on Google Gemini (cloud) or local FLUX Klein via ComfyUI on this machine.
Settings.providerGeminiHint: Uses GEMINI_API_KEY. Best quality for customer photos. Works when deployed online.
Settings.providerLocalHint: Uses ComfyUI at COMFYUI_BASE_URL (default http://127.0.0.1:8188). Requires ComfyUI running on the same PC as the dev server.

FittingRoom.title: The Fitting Room
FittingRoom.subtitle: Experience VOGO tailoring on your portrait. Select a garment, provide your photo, and preview the look before you visit our atelier.
FittingRoom.stepHint_product: Pick a suit or blazer from our collection.
FittingRoom.stepHint_photo: Upload, capture, or choose a model photo.
FittingRoom.stepHint_processing: AI is fitting your garment — please wait.
FittingRoom.stepHint_result: Compare before and after your virtual fitting.
FittingRoom.step1Desc: Select a piece from our collection to try on virtually.
FittingRoom.step2Desc: Upload a portrait photo, capture with your camera, or choose a ready model photo.
FittingRoom.step4Desc: See how {product} drapes on you. Drag the slider to compare before and after.
FittingRoom.avatarHint: Choose a real model portrait for a quick preview — upload your own photo for the most accurate fit.
FittingRoom.portraitHint: Portrait photos work best. We keep your full framing — no automatic crop.
FittingRoom.studioSubtitle: Capture or upload your portrait in the frame below.
FittingRoom.cameraIntro: Enable your camera when you're ready. We won't access it until you tap below.
FittingRoom.pickModel: Pick a model from the gallery — your selection fills the frame.
FittingRoom.noPhotoYet: Your portrait will appear here once uploaded or captured.
FittingRoom.noProducts: No garments available for try-on right now.
FittingRoom.carouselHint: Swipe or use arrows to browse · Tap the center garment for details
FittingRoom.processingDesc: Our atelier AI is fitting your selected garment. Sit back — this usually takes under a minute.
FittingRoom.processingTip1: VOGO tailoring is built on precision — every lapel, every line, every finish.
FittingRoom.processingTip2: We're mapping your portrait so the garment drapes naturally on your frame.
FittingRoom.processingTip3: Luxury cloth needs patience — the best fit can't be rushed.
FittingRoom.processingTip4: Your selected piece is being aligned stitch by stitch in our virtual atelier.
FittingRoom.processingTip5: Tip: a clear head-to-toe portrait gives the most accurate try-on result.
FittingRoom.processingTip6: Almost there — final pressing and detail check before your reveal.
FittingRoom.portraitRequired: Please use a portrait photo (approx. 3:4 or 9:16 aspect ratio).
FittingRoom.invalidFile: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
FittingRoom.cameraDenied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera or upload a photo.
FittingRoom.captureFailed: Could not capture photo. Please try again.
FittingRoom.serverError: Server error during try-on. Please refresh and try again in a moment.
FittingRoom.rateLimit: Gemini is busy (rate limit). Wait about {seconds} seconds, then try again.
FittingRoom.quotaExceeded: Daily free image quota may be used up. Wait an hour or try again tomorrow, or enable billing in Google AI Studio.
FittingRoom.apiNotConfigured: Virtual try-on is not configured yet. Set IMAGE_PROVIDER and add GEMINI_API_KEY or NVIDIA_API_KEY in .env (see .env.example), then restart the dev server.
FittingRoom.loadErrorDesc: Something went wrong loading the virtual fitting room. The rest of the site is still available — try again or return home.

Toast.newsletterError: Could not subscribe. Please try again.
